job.jobManagementDescription: Define and manage job roles relevant to this program. You could find Atlas professions from https://atlasbt.enbek.kz/professions?department=&trends=&skills=
job.deleteJobConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this job? This action cannot be undone.
job.noJobsAvailable: No jobs available. Add a job, search Atlas, or generate jobs.
job.noMatchingJobs: No matching jobs found. Try a different search term.
job.typeToSearchAtlas: Type to search for jobs in Atlas.
job.failedToAddJobFromAtlas: Failed to add job from Atlas: {{error}}

standard.standardsManagementDescription: Define and manage educational standards for this program. Standards can be created manually, imported from professional standards, or generated automatically. You could find professional standards from https://career.enbek.kz/ru/professionalstandart
standard.name: Name
standard.noStandardsAvailable: No standards available. Add a standard, import from professional standards, or generate standards.
standard.deleteStandardConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this standard? This action cannot be undone.
standard.searchByNameHelperText: Search by standard name in the selected language, or by code
standard.typeToSearchProfStandards: Enter a search term to find professional standards

outcome.learningOutcomesManagementDescription: Define and manage learning outcomes for this program. Learning outcomes describe what students should know or be able to do upon completion.
outcome.noOutcomesAvailable: No learning outcomes available. Add an outcome or generate outcomes.
outcome.codeHelperText: Unique identifier for this learning outcome
outcome.deleteOutcomeConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this learning outcome? This action cannot be undone.
